reproductions.expected: Resolve template repo from git remote
reproductions.actual: Resolves project repo via gh repo view

reproductions.expected: Proxy then resolves to terminal value; single() returns {data:null}; signUp returns shaped response
reproductions.actual: then returns undefined (non-thenable); single() returns array shape; signUp falls through to generic proxy

reproductions.expected: Middleware bypasses in DEMO_MODE; NavBar falls back to getUser; browser client has production guard
reproductions.actual: Middleware throws on undefined env vars; NavBar only uses getSession; no production guard on browser client

reproductions.expected: PostHog key read from env var
reproductions.actual: Key hardcoded as string literal, caught by security review D1

reproductions.expected: Guidance includes NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix for client-side env vars
reproductions.actual: No mention of client-side env var naming convention
Says constant-time comparison without specifying API
